description: Schema defining data points to extract from bank disclosures and risk reports for ECB climate-related and environmental risk supervisory expectations compliance assessment

institution_name.description: Legal name of the supervised institution

reporting_year.description: Fiscal year of the report under assessment

ecb_supervised.description: Whether the institution is a Significant Institution (SI) directly supervised by the ECB

ce_risk_understanding.description: Status of the institution's understanding and assessment of C&E risks in its business environment (E1)

time_horizons_covered.description: Time horizons covered in the C&E risk assessment

risk_drivers_identified.description: Types of climate and environmental risk drivers identified
risk_drivers_identified.expected_format: Array of: transition_policy, transition_technology, transition_market, transition_legal, physical_acute, physical_chronic, biodiversity, pollution, water_stress

business_environment_monitoring.description: Status of systematic monitoring of C&E developments in the business environment (E2)

climate_strategy_integration.description: Status of climate risk integration in business strategy (E3)

transition_plan_published.description: Whether the institution has published a climate transition plan

green_financing_targets.description: Whether the institution has set targets for green or sustainable financing

risk_appetite_climate.description: Status of climate risk inclusion in risk appetite framework (E4)

climate_raf_indicators.description: Whether specific climate-related risk appetite indicators and limits are defined

organisational_responsibilities.description: Status of assignment of C&E risk responsibilities in the organisational structure (E5)

three_lines_of_defence.description: Whether C&E risk responsibilities are assigned across all three lines of defence

board_oversight_climate.description: Whether the management body exercises oversight of C&E risks (board/committee level)

internal_reporting_climate.description: Status of internal reporting on aggregated C&E risk data (E6)

risk_framework_integration.description: Status of C&E risk integration into the existing risk management framework (E7)

icaap_climate_integration.description: Whether climate risks are reflected in the ICAAP

credit_risk_climate.description: Status of climate risk consideration in credit risk management (E8)

credit_origination_climate.description: Whether climate factors are integrated into credit origination process

portfolio_monitoring_climate.description: Whether climate risk monitoring is established for the credit portfolio

operational_risk_climate.description: Status of climate risk assessment in operational and reputational risk (E9)

market_risk_climate.description: Status of climate factor monitoring in market risk positions (E10)

climate_stress_testing.description: Whether the institution conducts climate-related stress testing or scenario analysis

liquidity_risk_climate.description: Status of climate risk assessment in liquidity risk management (E11)

ilaap_climate_integration.description: Whether climate risks are incorporated into the ILAAP

disclosure_policy_climate.description: Status of climate-related disclosure policies and practices (E12)

tcfd_aligned.description: Whether climate disclosures are aligned with the TCFD framework

pillar3_esg_reported.description: Whether Pillar 3 ESG disclosure templates (CRR Article 449a) are reported

key_metrics_disclosed.description: Status of key metrics and vulnerability disclosures on C&E risks (E13)

financed_emissions_disclosed.description: Whether financed emissions are disclosed as part of C&E risk metrics

eu_taxonomy_gar.description: EU Taxonomy Green Asset Ratio if disclosed

sectoral_exposure_breakdown.description: Whether exposures to climate-sensitive sectors are broken down and disclosed

physical_risk_metrics.description: Whether physical risk exposure metrics are disclosed (e.g. geography-based risk maps)

transition_risk_metrics.description: Whether transition risk exposure metrics are disclosed (e.g. sector concentration, alignment)

validation_rules_definitions.non_empty: Value must not be null or empty string
validation_rules_definitions.boolean: Value must be true or false
validation_rules_definitions.range: Value must fall within specified min:max range
validation_rules_definitions.valid_entity_type: Must match a defined entity type in common/entity_types.json with ecb-regulation applicability
validation_rules_definitions.valid_status: Must be one of: reported, partial, missing
validation_rules_definitions.valid_status_with_na: Must be one of: reported, partial, missing, N/A
validation_rules_definitions.valid_ssm_class: Must be one of: SI, LSI, unknown
validation_rules_definitions.valid_time_horizons: Each element must be one of: short_term, medium_term, long_term
validation_rules_definitions.valid_risk_drivers: Each element must be a recognized C&E risk driver identifier
